title: Image To Image Traditional Physiognomy Analysis Report Poster
sourceTitle: Image To Image Traditional Physiognomy Analysis Report Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image vertical traditional physiognomy analysis report poster for user-owned face photo for symbolic feature-map visualization, preserving the uploaded portrait while presenting symbolic feature-map visualization. Subject: The uploaded half-body portrait remains centered with real facial features, face shape, and identity-preserving contours intact while traditional face-reading style visual annotation is expressed through twelve facial-palace callouts, six facial-detail closeups, and structured temperament-summary panels. Scene: Classical Chinese metaphysics report poster on xuan-paper beige background with ink black text, antique bronze-gold dividers, muted dark red seals, taiji, bagua, cloud, mountain-water texture, and mobile-readable dossier clarity. Composition: Fixed vertical mobile poster layout: top title block, left vertical motto, central preserved portrait, twelve numbered dashed callouts mapped to forehead, hairline, brows, eyes, under-eyes, nose bridge, cheekbones, lips, chin, face shape, ears, and overall complexion, six side closeup circles, bottom five-element reference, conclusion panels, radar chart, and entertainment note. Signature Elements: Central preserved uploaded portrait, traditional face-reading style visual annotation, face guide lines, feature regions, keyword tags, career and personality sections, entertainment disclaimer, twelve facial-palace numbers, six magnified facial-feature circles, five-element face reference, comprehensive four-part conclusion, pentagon radar chart, recent reminder, and cultural-symbolic entertainment framing. Style: High-end traditional Chinese face-reading report aesthetic with consultant-dossier authority, precise infographic annotation, classical border framing, clean callout geometry, fine paper texture, seal details, and polished mobile poster finish. Color Palette: Xuan-paper beige base, ink black typography, antique bronze-gold linework, dark red seal accents, soft warm shadows, and restrained five-element color chips. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Layered xuan paper, cardstock panels, ink linework, bronze-gold dividers, red seal marks, faint landscape texture, and crisp dotted leader lines. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for palace names, visible feature notes, symbolic interpretation, trend hints, action advice, five-element references, radar scores, and the entertainment disclaimer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
